title: Simplistic HUD
description: A pack that aims to make the in-game HUD simplistic and easy to read!
body:
A pack that aims to make the in-game HUD more simplistic and easy to read!
with an 8-bit looking style and simple shapes, you'll have an easier time reading your HUD in any condition!

This pack SHOULD work on pretty much any version! But for versions that may be way too old, use with caution!
